rulings.Case Title: ANDREA MANGAN VS. KEY MORTGAGE CORP DBA KMC MORTGAGE CORP
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 18, 2015, line 8. Plaintiff'S Motion To Amend Complaint GRANTED, no opposition filed. Plaintiff shall file and serve its amended complaint forthwith = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES ENGELBERG VS. ELLEN TSANG, AS TRUSTEE OF THE ARZA TRUST et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Cross-Complainant Ellen Tsang To Answer Deposition Questions And Produce Documents
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 18, 2015, line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT CHARLES ENGELBERG'S Motion To Compel Cross-Complainant Ellen Tsang To Answer Deposition Questions And Produce Documents granted. (1) In deposition, witness is to respond to questions concerning identity of beneficiaries. The beneficiaries have only a limited privacy interest in their identities. Follow-up questions concerning beneficiaries will be limited to beneficiary contact information. Depending upon the age and relationship of the beneficiaries to the settlor(s), the personal knowledge of the beneficiaries (as opposed to hearsay information) is likely to be limited. (2) The trust agreement (with amendments) is to be produced at the deposition in redacted form to exclude all information except for (a) trustee appointment, designation, and acceptance, (b) authority or powers of the trustee, and (c) beneficiary identification. As to the authority and designation of the trustee, a review of the trust document is acceptable. The funding, distribution, and general operative terms of the trust, however, lie outside the scope of the litigation and are subject to the beneficiaries' and settlor's privacy privilege.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: T.D. SERVICE COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Noticeof Motion For Discharge And Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 18, 2015, line 2. PLAINTIFF T.D. SERVICE COMPANY'S Motion For Discharge And Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs GRANTED. Attorney's fees in the amount of $6,577.83 shall be paid to plaintiff out of the interpleaded funds. Plaintiff is discharged. Plaintiff to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JONATHAN E. MILES VS. DANIEL N. MILES et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 18, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANT LAURA MILES' DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Defendant fails to demur to the 4th cause of action for constrictive/resulting trust. (See Demurrer), therefore the demurrer to the Second Amended Complaint ( See Notice of Demurrer) survives the general demurrer. Request for sanction pursuant to CCP 128.5. Plaintiff failed to comply with CCP 128.5(f) ("Any sanctions imposed pursuant to this section shall be imposed consistently with the standards, conditions, and procedures set forth in subdivisions (c), (d), and (h) of Section 128.7."). = (501/REQ)
